quicksight.template.tooltipoptions.CfnAb: The display options for the visual tooltip.

quicksight.template.tooltipoptions.Field.Description: The setup for the detailed tooltip. The tooltip setup is always saved. The display type is decided based on the tooltip type.

quicksight.template.tooltipoptions.Selec.Description: The selected type for the tooltip. Choose one of the following options:  +  `BASIC`: A basic tooltip.+  `DETAILED`: A detailed tooltip.

quicksight.template.tooltipoptions.Toolt.Description: Determines whether or not the tooltip is visible.
